q-component bind-css-box { q-property w: "120px" q-property h: "32px" q-bind-css { this.component.w this.component.style.width } q-bind-css { this.component.h this.component.style.height } style { display: grid; place-items: center; background: #1d4ed8; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 800; } text { q-bind-css } } bind-css-box#box { } q-timer bindCssTestTimer { interval: 140 repeat: false running: true onTimeout { var box = document.querySelector("#box"); if (box) { box.w = "220px"; box.h = "44px"; window.setTimeout(function() { document.body.dataset.status = box.style.width === "220px" && box.style.height === "44px" ? "pass" : "fail"; }, 160); } else { document.body.dataset.status = "fail"; } } }
